untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of calendar date (last 7-10 trading days of month) and clustering bias across historical monthly peaks. Available indicators do not include calendar/date functions or statistical clustering metrics. The core logic—'price peaks occur more frequently in late month'—requires historical cross-sectional analysis of intra-monthly price patterns, which cannot be expressed as a single-bar technical condition. To implement properly would require: (1) day-of-month indicator, (2) historical peak frequency aggregation by calendar period, and (3) statistical clustering detection—none of which are in the allowed indicator list.
translation_notes: Attempted a generic breakout condition (close > prev_high) as a partial proxy for 'anticipate breakouts/highs', but this does not capture the calendar clustering bias or late-month timing requirement. Full signal translation is not feasible within current indicator constraints.
